---
name: Performance
about: Performance improvement (perf:)
---

## Summary

<!-- What got faster or lighter, and how was it measured? -->

## Commits

Use **`perf:`** or **`perf(scope):`**, e.g. `perf: lazy-load heavy preview iframe`.

## Checklist

- [ ] Improvement is described or benchmarked where practical
- [ ] No functional regressions in the affected paths
